{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Mirage: 5s, 6s, Awakened}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=Nuclear Bomb
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-25
|source=Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.07%)
|description=On Jul 16, 1945 AD, the very first nuclear bomb exploded.

A nuclear bomb derives its power from the nuclear fission of uranium. Its purpose is to cause large-sale radioactive contamination and devastation via photothermal radiation, shockwave, and induced radioactivity. Not only is the energy released massive, but the nuclear reaction only takes microseconds to release energy.

[Basic info]

Length: 2.5 meters

Diameter: 0.61 meters

Weight: 3900 kg

Yield: 15000 tons
|fame=54
|art=71
|fth=63
|civ=68
|tech=106
|ss1=When you defeat Agents, gain +1.5% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +30<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +30<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss2=When you defeat Agents, gain +2% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +40<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +40<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss3=When you defeat Agents, gain +2.5% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +50<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +50<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss4=When you defeat Agents, gain +3.5% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +70<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +70<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss5=When you defeat Agents, gain +4.5% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +90<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +90<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss6=When you defeat Agents, gain +6% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +120<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +120<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss7=When you defeat Agents, gain +6% W-tads<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +120<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail DEF +120<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8<br>When you defeat agents, gain +5% W-tads (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail ATK +600
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail RUSH +600
|skill3=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Mecha Cells gained +15%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Agent Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Realm Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
